# @acme/web

React SPA frontend for the Acme Platform.

## Development

```bash
npm run dev
```

Opens on [http://localhost:5173](http://localhost:5173).

## Environment Variables

| Variable | Default | Description |
|----------|---------|-------------|
| `VITE_API_URL` | `http://localhost:3001` | API server URL |

## Pages

- `/` - Dashboard home
- `/users` - User management
